title: Design-Led Cat Carrier Triptych
description: Balances marketplace clarity, a gentle travel story, and feature-detail photography for one premium cat carrier.
prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: three premium pet-commerce previews in one seamless horizontal contact sheet
Primary request: Create a warm, design-led 3-panel horizontal contact sheet for the exact same unbranded structured cat travel carrier, with distinct Chewy catalog, Instagram Shop lifestyle, and Amazon feature-detail treatments. Each panel is a complete standalone vertical 4:5 image, separated by narrow cream gutters.
Product invariant: identical compact carrier in every panel; olive-green recycled canvas rectangular body with gently arched top, tan vegetable-tanned leather handles, one large black mesh side window, matte brass zipper, cream sherpa removable base, no logo. Preserve proportions, window shape, handle count, seam positions and colors.
Panel 1 — CHEWY CATALOG: carrier alone in front three-quarter view on a soft pale-blue seamless studio, fully visible, one zipper neatly closed, gentle oval shadow, cheerful honest product clarity, no animal and no props.
Panel 2 — INSTAGRAM SHOP LIFESTYLE: same carrier beside a calm silver tabby cat in a sunlit modern train-compartment seat, carrier open with sherpa base visible, cat naturally sniffing the entrance, soft travel narrative, warm afternoon light, premium candid realism, no human visible.
Panel 3 — AMAZON FEATURE DETAIL: close three-quarter crop of the same carrier on warm white, mesh ventilation and brass zipper sharply rendered, one side opening reveals the cream sherpa base and organized interior volume without technical labels, clean infographic-like precision made only with photography.
Style/medium: ultra-photorealistic premium pet product photography, authentic canvas weave, leather grain, mesh and fur, cozy but modern art direction, restrained olive/tan/blue palette.
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra carrier, no duplicated cat, no distressed animal, no impossible transparent materials, no detached handles, no panel labels or numbers. Keep the exact carrier design consistent across all panels.

inputRequirements.instructions: No reference image is required. This record defines a fictional, unbranded product; use product-edit mode for real inventory.

productInvariants: identical compact carrier in this output; olive-green recycled canvas rectangular body with gently arched top, tan vegetable-tanned leather handles, one large black mesh side window, matte brass zipper, cream sherpa removable base, no logo. Preserve proportions, window shape, handle count, seam positions and colors.
negativePrompt: no readable text, no logos, no watermark, no extra carrier, no duplicated cat, no distressed animal, no impossible transparent materials, no detached handles, no added layout labels or numbers. Keep the exact carrier design consistent in this output.

zh.title: 设计感猫咪旅行包三场景
zh.description: 将清晰商品图、温和旅行叙事与功能细节摄影统一在同一款猫包上。
